items.name: Raul Valle
items.bio: Leads chapter direction across workshops, research-facing programming, and community building for students who want a rigorous but approachable way into signal processing.

items.name: Matheus Maldaner
items.bio: Supports chapter strategy and technical programming, with a focus on keeping research-minded projects connected to accessible student-facing events.

items.name: Tiffany Huang
items.bio: Coordinates logistics and chapter operations so workshops, announcements, and community touchpoints stay consistent throughout the semester.

items.name: Awwab Azam
items.bio: Develops educational programming and learning pathways that help members build signal-processing fluency through approachable, technically serious workshops.

items.name: Jack Payne
items.bio: Connects chapter activity to research-facing projects and helps shape opportunities for members who want to explore deeper technical work.

items.name: Luke Slaughter
items.bio: Builds relationships across the chapter community and supports programming that helps members meet collaborators, mentors, and peers across disciplines.

items.name: Divij Goyal
items.bio: Manages chapter finances and operational planning so events, resources, and chapter initiatives stay organized and sustainable.
